title: Carpet Org Addition
description: This is an expansion mod for Carpet that offers some useful or useless features, which does not change the mechanics of any game by default, and all features need to be turned on manually
body:
Carpet Org Addition
---
This is an expansion mod for [Carpet](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet) that offers some useful or useless features, which does not change the mechanics of any game by default, and all features need to be turned on manually

- villagerInfiniteTrade:Allows unlimited transactions with villagers
- commandPlayerAction:Allow fake players to automatically perform some actions
- commandLocations:Simple in-game location management
- ...

这是一个[Carpet](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet)的扩展模组，提供了一些实用或无用的功能，默认情况下不会更改任何游戏的机制，所有功能都需要手动开启

report any bugs on github 
https://github.com/fcsailboat/Carpet-Org-Addition/

Added rules
---
You can find the list of all added rules and change log on the [repo](https://github.com/cdqtzrc/Carpet-Org-Addition)
